LAW AND MOTION 301, PROOF OF SERVICE PRESENTED TO THE COURT; AFFIDAVIT OF SERVICE IS APPROPRIATE. PETITIONER CACV OF COLORADO, LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
